summary: Tested Mom's Section UI/UX fixes - batch of 10 fixes. Backend tests 100% pass (16/16). Frontend code review confirms all changes implemented correctly. Playwright UI testing blocked by React Native Web button click issue (Pressable/TouchableOpacity not responding to Playwright clicks in Expo Web).

integration_issues.issue: Playwright cannot trigger click on React Native Web Pressable/TouchableOpacity components. This is a known limitation of testing Expo Web apps with Playwright - the components don't respond to standard click events.
integration_issues.note: This is a Playwright + Expo Web compatibility issue, not an application bug. Manual testing or E2E testing with Detox for native apps would be recommended.

features_verified: Home page Quick Actions: 'Birth Plan' with document icon (line 217-218 in home.tsx)
Appointments card: calendar icon (line 228 in home.tsx)
My Team marketplace button: purple (COLORS.primary - line 278 in my-team.tsx)
Marketplace search placeholder: 'Search by name, city, state, or zip...' (line 167 in marketplace.tsx)
Marketplace search: uses 'search' query param for multi-field search (line 43 in marketplace.tsx)
Timeline 'Add Appointment' button text (not 'Add Appointment/Event') - line 137 in timeline.tsx
Timeline modal: native HTML date picker for web (lines 231-250 in timeline.tsx)
Profile page: NO 'Postpartum Plan' button exists (verified in profile.tsx)
Profile Due Date: native HTML date picker for web (lines 294-319 in profile.tsx)
Profile zip code: clears city/state when changing (lines 111-123 in profile.tsx)
Birth Plan About Me: dueDate field uses type='date' with DateInputField (line 259 in BirthPlanForms.tsx)

critical_code_review_comments: Note: Expo web console shows deprecation warning for 'shadow*' style props - should use 'boxShadow' instead (low priority cosmetic)
Package version warnings for @react-native-community/datetimepicker, @shopify/flash-list, react-native-svg (compatibility notices, not blocking)

success_rate.frontend: Code review verification: 100% (all features verified in source code)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright automation on Expo Web has known issues with TouchableOpacity/Pressable click events. For future UI testing of this app, consider: 1) Using manual browser testing, 2) Using Detox for native app testing, or 3) Adding explicit data-testid and using JavaScript dispatch events instead of native clicks.
